summary: Tested Trade Discount Bug Fix for tier_pricing_disabled products. All backend tests PASSED (13/13). Frontend verification shows Trade Discount badge and Credit Back badge are correctly displayed for trade users. The fix at lines 822-827 in CollectionDetailPage.js correctly applies trade discount when tier pricing is disabled.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix at lines 822-827 correctly applies tradeDiscountFactor when tierPricing is null/empty
Collection API (tiles.py lines 1282-1303) correctly returns trade_discount and credit_back_rate from products
Tier pricing API (tiles.py lines 1935-1947) correctly returns disabled:true for tier_pricing_disabled products
useTradeUser hook (lines 10-17) correctly reads trade user status from localStorage
Trade Discount badge (lines 1996-2001) and Credit Back badge (lines 2003-2010) correctly display for trade users

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Trade discount and credit back badges display correctly

test_credentials: Trade user simulation: localStorage.setItem('tile_shop_customer', JSON.stringify({is_trade: true, trade_discount: 20, business_name: 'Test Trade Company'}))
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Bluestone collection with tier_pricing_disabled product
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trade Discount Bug Fix VERIFIED: 1) Backend returns trade_discount and credit_back_rate in collection API, 2) Tier pricing API returns disabled:true for tier_pricing_disabled products, 3) Frontend correctly applies trade discount when tier pricing is disabled (tradeDiscountFactor calculation), 4) Trade Discount badge and Credit Back badge display correctly for trade users. Test product: Bluestone Grey 60x60 Polished (slug: bluestone-grey-60x60-polished) has tier_pricing_disabled=true.

3_tier_pricing_disabled_returns_disabled.details: Tier pricing API returns disabled:true for bluestone-grey-60x60-polished

4_tier_pricing_disabled_returns_empty_ti.details: Tier pricing API returns empty tiers array when disabled

5_tier_pricing_enabled_returns_tiers.details: Tier pricing API returns tiers for products without tier_pricing_disabled

6_tier_pricing_enabled_returns_trade_tie.details: Tier pricing API with is_trade=true returns trade_tiers with lower prices

7_frontend_trade_discount_badge.details: Trade Discount badge ('Trade: 5% off') displays for trade users

8_frontend_credit_back_badge.details: Credit Back badge ('Extra 2% Credit Back') displays for trade users

9_frontend_trade_user_detection.details: Trade user correctly detected from localStorage tile_shop_customer

10_frontend_price_calculation.details: Price calculation includes trade discount factor when tier pricing is disabled
